apps.name: Tip Calculator
apps.description: Split a bill, dial in the tip, and see the per-person total.

apps.name: Unit Converter
apps.description: Convert a value between meters, kilometers, feet, inches, and miles.

apps.name: Color Picker
apps.description: Mix an RGB colour and copy the hex and rgb() values.

apps.name: Pomodoro Timer
apps.description: A focus countdown with 25/15/5-minute presets and start, pause, and reset.

apps.name: Quote Shuffler
apps.description: A small pocket of quotes — shuffle for a fresh one.

apps.name: Dice Roller
apps.description: Roll a handful of dice — d4 through d20 — and total the result.
